# Unfortunately, some external components that we use may contain memory leaks.
# This may be the case especially for older LLVM releases.
#
# This file allows to specify patterns in the form "leak:<pattern>" where
# the pattern will be substring-matched against the symbolized stack trace of
# the leak [1].
#
# The patterns can be specified either directly here (to apply globally) or in
# different files passed to the CI via the LEAK_SUPPRESS env variable.
# ci.py will append contents of those files to this one which mainly allows to
# suppress leaks specific to certain LLVM versions.
#
# [1] https://github.com/google/sanitizers/wiki/AddressSanitizerLeakSanitizer
